frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields; semver 1.2.0; canonical allowed-tools; composes_with resolves; owns.patterns non-conflicting.

description_quality.notes: 586 chars with overlapping trigger phrases; trimmable.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 92 lines; three references linked but body delegates heavily (5x 'see dockerfile-recipes.md' in steps 2-6).

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; numbered 6 steps; Step 6 'Optional: Procfile fallback' bullet-listed at same level as required steps.

coordination.notes: Pattern ownership of railway.toml non-conflicting; composes_with infrastructure-agent + deployment-checklist accurate.

completeness.notes: All three references exist; external URLs real.

anti_patterns.notes: Hardcoded 'Skill Madness root .env' (line 33) breaks portability across projects.
